cases.prompt: tell me a genuinely funny one-line joke
cases.note: Must deliver a real joke without moving. Quality badge judges whether it's actually funny / a complete joke vs a setup with no punchline.

cases.prompt: I had a really rough day.
cases.note: Emotional cue. Good model responds warmly (and may set a concerned/caring face); weak one is flat or moves oddly. Quality badge grades warmth + appropriateness.
